name: Signed Binary Proxy Execution - Process Detected
description: Detects the use of legitimate, signed Windows binaries like `mavinject.exe`, `certutil.exe`, and `msiexec.exe` to proxy the execution of malicious content. This is a common **Defense Evasion** technique used by adversaries to bypass security controls that rely on process or signature-based defenses.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a signed Windows binary, **{process}**, was executed with a suspicious command line: **{command}**. This is a strong indicator of **Signed Binary Proxy Execution** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1218**), where an adversary is attempting to use a trusted utility to execute malicious code. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious file. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: process
parameters.description: The name of the signed binary that was executed.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
